case_title: EDNA JOHNS VS. TRAVIS W LEWIS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0) SERVED DEC-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, TRAVIS W

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY JOHNS, EDNA AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, TRAVIS W ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNS, EDNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, TRAVIS W $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN MARCH 27, 2015, RETURN TO PLAINTIFF THE 1995 BMW LICENSE NUMBER 7CUV580, WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNS, EDNA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD
